__inputs.name: DS_INFLUXDB
__inputs.label: InfluxDB
__inputs.description: InfluxDB datasource for Sand Plant Real data

description: Real-time monitoring dashboard for Sand Plant PLC data — Cycle tracking, moisture sensors, material weights, compactibility, and fault alerts.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "energy-readings")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "SandPlantReal")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "CYCLE_NO")
  |> last()
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "energy-readings")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "SandPlantReal")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "COMP_PRESET_PCT")
  |> last()
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "energy-readings")

  |> last()
  |> yield(name: "last")

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "SandPlantReal")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "TOTAL_WATER")
  |> last()
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "energy-readings")

from(bucket: "energy-readings")

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "SandPlantReal")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "Sand_Too_Wet_Fault")
  |> last()
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "energy-readings")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "SandPlantReal")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "Rtc_First_Cycle_Start")
  |> last()
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "energy-readings")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "SandPlantReal")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "SAND_TEMP")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

panels.title: ⚖️ Material Weights (Bentonite / Coal Dust / Old Sand)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "energy-readings")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "SandPlantReal")
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r["_field"] == "CYCLE_NO" or
    r["_field"] == "COMP_PRESET_PCT" or
    r["_field"] == "SAND_TEMP" or
    r["_field"] == "CORRECTED_PRESET" or
    r["_field"] == "READJUST_WATER" or
    r["_field"] == "AS1_MEASURE" or
    r["_field"] == "CORRECTED_WATER_1" or
    r["_field"] == "AS2_MEASURE" or
    r["_field"] == "CORRECTED_WATER_2" or
    r["_field"] == "AS3_MEASURE" or
    r["_field"] == "CORRECTED_WATER_3" or
    r["_field"] == "VARIATION" or
    r["_field"] == "TOTAL_WATER" or
    r["_field"] == "CYCLE_TIME" or
    r["_field"] == "COMP_STRENGTH_PRESET" or
    r["_field"] == "COMP_STRENGTH_MEASURED" or
    r["_field"] == "WEIGHT_BENTONITE" or
    r["_field"] == "WEIGHT_COALDUST" or
    r["_field"] == "WEIGHT_OLD_SAND" or
    r["_field"] == "FINAL_MEASURE" or
    r["_field"] == "Rtc_First_Cycle_Start" or
    r["_field"] == "Sand_Too_Wet_Fault"
  )
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 50)
  |> yield(name: "table")

title: Sand Plant Real PLC Monitoring
